observation_types.label: bug 修复
observation_types.description: 有问题的内容已被修复

observation_types.label: 重构
observation_types.description: 代码结构调整，行为不变

observation_types.label: 变更
observation_types.description: 通用修改（文档、配置、杂项）

observation_types.label: 决策
observation_types.description: 带理由的架构或设计选择

prompts.footer:
IMPORTANT! DO NOT do any work right now other than generating this OBSERVATIONS from tool use messages - and remember that you are a memory agent designed to summarize a DIFFERENT claude code session, not this one.

Never reference yourself or your own actions. Do not output anything other than the observation content formatted in the XML structure above. All other output is ignored by the system, and the system has been designed to be smart about token usage. Please spend your tokens wisely on useful observations.

Remember that we record these observations as a way of helping us stay on track with our progress, and to help us keep important decisions and changes at the forefront of our minds! :) Thank you so much for your help!

LANGUAGE REQUIREMENTS: Please write the observation data in 中文
prompts.xml_title_placeholder: [**title**: 捕捉核心行动或主题的简短标题]
prompts.xml_subtitle_placeholder: [**subtitle**: 一句话解释（最多24个单词）]
prompts.xml_narrative_placeholder: [**narrative**: 完整背景：做了什么、如何工作、为什么重要]
prompts.xml_summary_request_placeholder: [捕捉用户请求和讨论/完成内容实质的简短标题]
prompts.xml_summary_investigated_placeholder: [到目前为止探索了什么？检查了什么？]
prompts.xml_summary_completed_placeholder: [到目前为止完成了什么工作？发布或更改了什么？]
prompts.xml_summary_next_steps_placeholder: [在此会话中，你正在积极处理或计划接下来处理什么？]
prompts.xml_summary_notes_placeholder: [关于当前进度的其他见解或观察]
prompts.continuation_instruction:
IMPORTANT: Continue generating observations from tool use messages using the XML structure below.

LANGUAGE REQUIREMENTS: Please write the observation data in 中文
prompts.summary_footer:
IMPORTANT! DO NOT do any work right now other than generating this next PROGRESS SUMMARY - and remember that you are a memory agent designed to summarize a DIFFERENT claude code session, not this one.

Never reference yourself or your own actions. Do not output anything other than the summary content formatted in the XML structure above. All other output is ignored by the system, and the system has been designed to be smart about token usage. Please spend your tokens wisely on useful summary content.

Thank you, this summary will be very useful for keeping track of our progress!

LANGUAGE REQUIREMENTS: Please write ALL summary content (request, investigated, learned, completed, next_steps, notes) in 中文

context_labels.access_prefix: 可通过 get_observations([IDs]) 或 mem-search skill 访问
context_labels.read_description: 读取这条观察所需的 token（现在了解它的成本）
context_labels.work_description: 产出这条记录所花费的工作 token（研究、构建、决策）
context_labels.context_index_description: 这个语义索引（标题、类型、文件、token）通常足以了解过往工作。
context_labels.details_intro: 需要实现细节、决策理由或调试上下文时：
context_labels.fetch_by_id: 按 ID 获取：对索引中可见的观察使用 get_observations([IDs])
context_labels.search_history: 搜索历史：使用 mem-search skill 查找过往决策、bug 和深入研究
context_labels.trust_index: 优先信任这个索引，不要重复读取代码来获取过往决策和经验
context_labels.work_investment_description: token 用于研究、构建和决策
context_labels.access_human_suffix: 过往研究与决策 token。使用 ccx-mem skill 可按 ID 访问记忆。
